MASTER CALENDAR EXPEDITED JURY

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-06-2018 Continued To Mar-14-19 At 01:00 P.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Entry Of Judgement Based On Award Of Arbitrator On Grounds Of Mistake, Inadvertence, Surprise Or Excusable Neglect
Off Calendar Jul-09-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Adolph Karajah, Esq. 415-474-1900 of Kern Segal & Murray for Plaintiff DESOTO CAB COMPANY.(based on order/Counsel did not submit a business card)
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF DESOTO CAB COMPANY'S Motion To Vacate Entry Of Judgement Based On Award Of Arbitrator On Grounds Of Mistake, Inadvertence, Surprise Or Excusable Neglect.

Plaintiff Desoto Cab Company, Inc.'s motion to vacate entry of judgment based on award or arbitrator is granted. The judgment filed May 24, 2018 is now set aside and the case is restored to the civil active list as if Desoto had timely filed a request for a de novo trial. Desoto has shown that it is entitled to the relief it seeks per the mandatory and discretionary provisions of CCP 473(b). Granting the motion comports with California's strong policy of deciding cases on their merits and defendant Tina Liu has not identified any legal prejudice she would suffer by the granting of the motion. There is no evidence that this motion was filed due to "buyer's remorse," as contended by Ms. Liu.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Not Reported. =(302/HK)
